title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 15: The Supreme Person
description: Chapter 15 of the Bhagavad Gita: The cosmos is an inverted tree rooted in heaven. Cut it down with the axe of detachment.
introduction: Chapter 15 of the Bhagavad Gita: The cosmos is an inverted tree rooted in heaven. Cut it down with the axe of detachment.

translation.text: This world is like an imperishable fig tree with its roots above and branches below. Its leaves are the Vedas.
